visual_description:
A close-up shot focuses on the face of a man in a dimly lit, blue-toned room. He has dark hair and appears distressed, with a pained expression. He is looking down and to his right. On his left wrist, a watch is visible. White Chinese characters appear at the bottom of the screen, reading "不知道" (Don't know). In the top right corner, a watermark with the text "风行网" is present. The audio opens with a man speaking in a low, dejected, and slightly shaky voice, saying, "不知道" (Don't know).

The camera pulls back to a wider shot, revealing a tense meeting in a dark, wood-paneled room. Three men are seated around a large table. On the right, a man in a light-colored suit and glasses sits behind the table, looking down at a briefcase. In the center, with his back to the camera, a man in a white shirt sits with his arms crossed. To the left, another man in a blue shirt is also seated. A fourth man, wearing a plaid shirt, enters the room from a doorway in the background and walks toward the table. The "风行网" watermark remains in the top right corner. Another
